resource.name: ErrorInitializing
resource.object: An unhandled exception occurred during initialization.

resource.name: ErrorRunning
resource.object: An unhandled exception occurred during program execution.

resource.name: NoAccessToConfiguration
resource.object: The given user has no access to any menu items in this configuration.

resource.name: LicenseLookupFailed
resource.object: All client licenses are currently being used.

resource.name: ReallyExit
resource.object: Do you really want to exit from Innova

resource.name: ReallyLogout
resource.object: Do you really want to logout from Innova

resource.name: KeyExpiring
resource.object: Innova is running on a license key that will expire soon. The last day for full operation of Innova using the current license key is {0}

resource.name: KeyInvalid
resource.object: The currently installed license key is invalid for the Innova server machine. Please obtain a new license key.

resource.name: InitializeLockTimeout
resource.object: Server programs are being reconfigured. Please wait a few seconds and try again.

resource.name: LicenseKeyMissing
resource.object: No License Key is installed in the system.

resource.name: LicenseKeyFailedVerification
resource.object: The currently installed License Key fails signature verification.

resource.name: LicenseReleasedMessage
resource.object: Can't find client instance license: {0}.{1}. {2}Please contact a system administrator. {2}Closing application.

resource.name: SaveChanges
resource.object: Do you want to save changes

resource.name: DeleteSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to delete the row?

resource.name: DeleteMultipleRows
resource.object: Do you want to delete {0} rows?

resource.name: erropends
resource.object: Could not open datasets for the report.

resource.name: errorConnecting
resource.object: Could not open connection to the database.

resource.name: PreviewStringId.Msg_FontInvalidNumber
resource.object: The font size cannot be set to zero or a negative number

resource.name: PreviewStringId.Msg_IncorrectPageRange
resource.object: This is not a valid page range

resource.name: PreviewStringId.Msg_NotSupportedFont
resource.object: This font is not yet supported

resource.name: PreviewStringId.Msg_PageMarginsWarning
resource.object: One or more margins are set outside the printable area of the page. Continue?

resource.name: PreviewStringId.Msg_WrongPageSettings
resource.object: The current printer doesn't support the selected paper size.\nProceed with printing anyway?

resource.name: PreviewStringId.Msg_WrongPrinter
resource.object: The printer name is invalid. Please check the printer settings.

resource.name: erropends
resource.object: Could not open datasets for the report.

resource.name: MainReportMissing
resource.object: Parent report has not been supplied

resource.name: MainReportBaseControllerMissing
resource.object: Parent report has no base controller.

resource.name: AssemblyNotFound
resource.object: Assembly {0} not found in Assemblies table.

resource.name: NotAReportCE
resource.object: Class {0} is not a report controller extension

resource.name: NotMatching
resource.object: The password and the password confirmation do not match

resource.name: ResetBar
resource.object: Are you sure you want to reset the changes made to the '{0}' toolbar?

resource.name: ToolBarMenu
resource.object: &Reset$&Delete$!&Name$!Defau&lt style$&Text Only (Always)$Text &Only (in Menus)$Image &and Text$!Begin a &Group$&Visible$&Most recently used

resource.object: &Place Quick Access Toolbar above the Ribbon

resource.name: RibbonToolbarBelow
resource.object: &Place Quick Access Toolbar below the Ribbon

resource.object: Bitmap Files (*.bmp)|*.bmp|Graphics Interchange Format (*.gif)|*.gif|JPEG File Interchange Format (*.jpg)|*.jpg

resource.name: MaskBoxValidateError
resource.object:
The entered value is incomplete. Do you want to correct it?
Yes - return to the editor and correct the value. No - leave the value as is. Cancel - reset to the previous value.

resource.object: Is greater than or equal to

resource.name: FilterClauseLessOrEqual
resource.object: Is less than or equal to

resource.object: Adds a new condition to this group.

resource.name: FilterToolTipValueType
resource.object: Compare to a value / another field's value.

resource.name: FilterToolTipElementAdd
resource.object: Adds a new item to the list.

resource.object: is greater than or equal to

resource.name: CustomFilterDialogConditionLTE
resource.object: is less than or equal to

resource.object: Drag a column header here to group by that column

resource.name: GridNewRowText
resource.object: Click here to add a new row

resource.name: GridOutlookIntervals
resource.object: Older;Last Month;Earlier this Month;Three Weeks Ago;Two Weeks Ago;Last Week;;;;;;;;Yesterday;Today;Tomorrow;;;;;;;;Next Week;Two Weeks Away;Three Weeks Away;Later this Month;Next Month;Beyond Next Month;

resource.name: PrintDesignerDescription
resource.object: Set up various printing options for the current view.

resource.name: CustomFilterDialogHint
resource.object: Use _ to represent any single character#Use % to represent any series of characters

resource.name: Msg_WrongReportClassName
resource.object: An error occurred during deserialization - possible wrong report class name

resource.name: Msg_CreateReportInstance
resource.object:
The report currently being edited is of a different type than the one you are trying to open.
Do you want to open the selected report anyway?

resource.name: Msg_FileCorrupted
resource.object: Can't load the report. The file is possibly corrupted or report's assembly is missing.

resource.name: Msg_FileContentCorrupted
resource.object: Can't load the report's layout. The file is possibly corrupted or contains incorrect information.

resource.name: Msg_InvalidMethodCall
resource.object: This method call is invalid for the object's current state

resource.name: Msg_ScriptError
resource.object: There are following errors in script(s): {0}

resource.name: Msg_ScriptExecutionError
Msg_InvalidReportSource
resource.object: Can not be set to a descendant of the current report

resource.name: Msg_CantFitBarcodeToControlBounds
resource.object: Control's boundaries are too small for the barcode

resource.name: Msg_InvalidBarcodeText
resource.object: There are invalid characters in the text

resource.name: Msg_CreateSomeInstance
resource.object: Can't create two instances of a class on a form

resource.name: Msg_FillDataError
resource.object: Error when trying to populate the data source. The following exception was thrown:

resource.name: Msg_CyclicBoormarks
resource.object: There are cyclic bookmarks in the report.

resource.name: Msg_ScriptingPermissionErrorMessage
Msg_ReportImporting
resource.object: Importing a report layout. Please, wait...

resource.name: Msg_IncorrectPadding
resource.object: The padding should be greater than or equal to 0.

resource.name: Msg_WarningControlsAreOverlapped
resource.object: Export Warning: The following controls are overlapped and may be exported to HTML, XLS and RTF incorrectly ({0}).

resource.name: Msg_WarningControlsAreOutOfMargin
resource.object: Printing Warning: The following controls are outside the right page margin, and this will cause extra pages to be printed ({0}).

resource.name: UD_Msg_ReportChanged
resource.object: Report has been changed. Do you want to save changes ?

resource.name: FSForm_Lbl_CustomGeneral
resource.object: General format has no specific number format

resource.name: SSForm_Msg_MoreThanOneStyle
resource.object: You selected more than one style

resource.name: PanelDesignMsg
resource.object: Place controls here to keep them together

resource.name: MultiColumnDesignMsg2
resource.object: Controls placed here will be printed incorrectly.

resource.name: UD_Hint_NewWizardReport
resource.object: Create a new report using the Wizard

resource.name: UD_Hint_SaveFileAs
resource.object: Save a report with a new name

resource.name: UD_Hint_Cut
resource.object: Delete the control and copy it to the clipboard

resource.name: UD_Hint_Copy
resource.object: Copy the control to the clipboard

resource.name: UD_Hint_Paste
resource.object: Add the control from the clipboard

resource.name: UD_Hint_SelectAll
resource.object: Select all the controls in the document

resource.name: UD_Hint_ForegroundColor
resource.object: Set the foreground color of the control

resource.name: UD_Hint_BackGroundColor
resource.object: Set the background color of the control

resource.name: UD_Hint_JustifyLeft
resource.object: Align the control's text to the left

resource.name: UD_Hint_JustifyCenter
resource.object: Align the control's text to the center

resource.name: UD_Hint_JustifyRight
resource.object: Align the control's text to the right

resource.name: UD_Hint_AlignCenters
resource.object: Align the centers of the selected controls vertically

resource.name: UD_Hint_AlignTops
resource.object: Align the tops of the selected controls

resource.name: UD_Hint_AlignMiddles
resource.object: Align the centers of the selected controls horizontally

resource.name: UD_Hint_AlignBottoms
resource.object: Align the bottoms of the selected controls

resource.name: UD_Hint_AlignToGrid
resource.object: Align the positions of the selected controls to the grid

resource.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeWidth
resource.object: Make the selected controls have the same width

resource.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeSizeToGrid
resource.object: Size the selected controls to the grid

resource.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeHeight
resource.object: Make the selected controls have the same height

resource.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeBoth
resource.object: Make the selected controls the same size

resource.name: UD_Hint_SpacingMakeEqual
resource.object: Make the spacing between the selected controls equal

resource.name: UD_Hint_SpacingIncrease
resource.object: Increase the spacing between the selected controls

resource.name: UD_Hint_SpacingDecrease
resource.object: Decrease the spacing between the selected controls

resource.name: UD_Hint_SpacingRemove
resource.object: Remove the spacing between the selected controls

resource.name: UD_Hint_CenterInFormHorizontally
resource.object: Horizontally center the selected controls within a band

resource.name: UD_Hint_CenterInFormVertically
resource.object: Vertically center the selected controls within a band

resource.name: UD_Hint_OrderBringToFront
resource.object: Bring the selected controls to the front

resource.name: UD_Hint_OrderSendToBack
resource.object: Move the selected controls to the back

resource.name: PrintDesignerDescription
resource.object: Set up various printing options for the current treelist.

resource.object: Do you want to correct the value ?

resource.name: MultiSelectMethodNotSupported
resource.object: Specified method will not work when OptionsBehavior.MultiSelect is inactive.

resource.name: InvalidRecordExceptionText
resource.object: Do you want to correct the value ?

resource.name: SelectMethod
resource.object: Select which method you want to use when deleting the document '{0}':

resource.name: radioGroup.Properties.Items.Item[1].Description
resource.object: Only delete association to object but keep the document itself

resource.name: buttonUpload.ToolTip
resource.object: Upload this document into the database

resource.name: buttonDownload.ToolTip
resource.object: Download this document to your computer

resource.name: buttonClear.ToolTip
resource.object: Clear this document from the database

resource.name: NoNullValues
resource.object: Column {0} does not allow empty values.

resource.name: BadUrl
resource.object: The specified URL is not well-formed. Web references must start with "http://" and file references must start with "\\" or "file://" or a drive letter.

resource.name: MaxFileSizeMsg
resource.object: File size {0}MB is too large. Maximum file size configured for documents is {1}MB.

resource.name: AddHint
resource.object: Adds a created document to the specific context you are located in

resource.name: EditHint
resource.object: Modifies the preferences of a document

resource.name: DeleteHint
resource.object: Deletes a document from a specific context or from all contexts within the system

resource.name: SaveHint
resource.object: Stores the document in the database

resource.name: SelectDocumentAssociate
resource.object: Select document to associate with object "{0}"

resource.name: BadUrlForRendering
resource.object: The selected document could not be rendered because it has an invalid URL.

resource.name: BadDocument
resource.object: The selected document could not be rendered because it is empty. Edit the document and add a new embedded document or an URL.

resource.name: DuplicateItem
resource.object: Document already associated with the help. Please select another document.

resource.name: CorrectData
resource.object: Do you want to correct the data?

resource.name: ConfirmDeleteAndChild
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the "{0}" document and all its child documents?

resource.name: ConfirmDelete
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the "{0}" document?

resource.name: ErrorAddMany
resource.object: An error occurred when storing documents. {0}

resource.name: FileTooBig
resource.object: File {0} is {1}MB while configured maximum is {2}MB.

resource.name: DocumentNotFound
resource.object: The document was not accessible or it does not exist. You might not have access to the document or the location of the document is invalid.\nFile name: {0}

resource.name: ApplyFailed
resource.object: Failed to apply changes to the database because of an unspecified error.

resource.name: restricttotimerangealarms_name
resource.object: Restrict to alarms occurred within\nproduction day selection

resource.name: PutIdOnReader
resource.object: Put your ID on the reader

resource.name: NoGroupAccess
resource.object: User has currently no access to IPC

resource.name: NoMu1Ax
resource.object: Unable connect to ActiveX control for Mu1 display

resource.name: errInitBarcode
resource.object: Device {0} is not supported as a Barcode reader. \nAny barcodes from this reader will not be sent to the proper display view.

resource.name: guinodenoitem
resource.object: Gui node has no applicable gui item.

resource.name: NoConnectionToDatabase
resource.object: Database is not online. Try again later.

resource.name: kickedOff
resource.object: The database closed the session. Try again later.

resource.name: SaveText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to save the changes?

resource.name: InitFieldsText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to initialize the fields? This will change the field setup.

resource.name: InitFiltersText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to initialize the filters? This will reset the filters.

resource.name: ApplyText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to apply grid columns to the pivot report?

resource.name: NotAuthenticated
resource.object: Wrong employee id or security code

resource.name: NotMatching
resource.object: The password and the password confirmation do not match

resource.name: LogonFailed
resource.object: The old password is wrong, could not change the password

resource.name: groupControlScan.Text
resource.object: Specify how to scan for files

resource.name: labelClickFinish.Text
resource.object: Click Finish to add the selected files

resource.name: ErrorScan
resource.object: An error occurred during scan of directory. {0}

resource.name: NoNullValues
resource.object: Column {0} does not allow empty values.

resource.name: FileSizeTooBig
resource.object: File size is too big {0}MB. Files can not be larger than the configured maximum of {1}MB.

resource.name: erropends
resource.object: Could not open datasets for the report.

resource.name: NoLicense
resource.object: Can't get Crystal Reports viewer license : {0}

resource.name: labelControl5.Text
resource.object: Enter any additional server IDs, one ID on each line:

resource.name: buttonOpenLicense.ToolTip
resource.object: Open a License Key from file

resource.name: buttonPasteLicenseKey.ToolTip
resource.object: Paste a License Key from clipboard

resource.name: LicenseKeyFormatError
resource.object: The format of the License Key is invalid.

resource.name: InstallOk
resource.object: The License Key was installed successfully.

resource.name: ChangeProductCodeWarning
resource.object: WARNING: Changing the Product Code will make the installed License Key invalid. The Innova system WILL NOT BE FULLY FUNCTIONAL until a new License Key has been installed.\n\nDo you wish to continue and change the Product Code?

resource.name: LicenseInstallNoKeyError
resource.object: No license key installed. A new key cannot be installed through this interface.

resource.name: LicenseInstallKeyTemporaryTypeError
resource.object: Temporary license key cannot be installed over permanent key.

resource.name: LicenseInstallKeyPermanentTypeError
resource.object: Permanent license key cannot be installed over temporary key.

resource.name: LicenseExtensionError
resource.object: The License Key can not be installed, it is not an extension of the existing key.\nUse the compare button to compare the key to the existing key.

resource.name: LicenseMessage
resource.object: Can't get an IPC client license: {0}.{1}

resource.name: LicenseMessage
resource.object: Can't get a PDA client license: {0}.{1}

resource.name: LicenseMessage
resource.object: Can't get a PC client license: {0}.{1}

resource.name: LicenseMessageAdmin
resource.object: Can't get an administration license for running PC client on server.

resource.name: ErrorNoDocMan
resource.object: Error: Cannot access document manager service

resource.name: BadUrlForRendering
resource.object: The selected document could not be rendered because it has an invalid URL

resource.name: BadDocument
resource.object: The selected document could not be rendered because it is empty. Edit the document and add a new embedded document or an URL.

resource.name: DeleteSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to delete the row?

resource.name: DeleteMultipleRows
resource.object: Do you want to delete {0} rows?

resource.name: CellSaveFailed
resource.object: Failed to save cell value.\nThe original value was '{0}'

resource.name: DeleteSingeReadOnlyRow
resource.object: The selected row is read-only and cannot be deleted

resource.name: DeleteMultipleRowsAllReadOnly
resource.object: All the selected rows are read-only and cannot be deleted

resource.name: DeleteMultipleRowsSomeReadOnly
resource.object: Out of the {0} selected rows {1} is/are read-only. Do you want to delete the other {2} rows?

resource.name: ConfirmSave
resource.object: A view configuration with the name {0} already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

resource.name: ConfirmRemove
resource.object: The configuration named {0} will be removed. There is no way to undo this operation. Do you want to continue?

resource.name: ConfirmStopDesigning
resource.object: Do you want to save your changes?

resource.name: Warning.DeleteRecord
resource.object: Do you want to delete this record?

resource.name: Warning.DeleteRecordExtra
resource.object: Deleting this record will also delete the list and all records referring to it!

resource.name: btnUpdActivity.Hint
resource.object: Update process unit activity for this program

resource.name: Err.Closing.Text
resource.object: Do you want to close the form and cancel the changes?

resource.name: NoDashboardSelected
resource.object: No dashboard selected! Please check the config.

resource.name: btnShowPage.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the page which the selected alarm is on

resource.name: CantWriteFile
resource.object: File {0} can't be written.\n\nMake sure it is not already open by Excel.

resource.name: LicenseMessage
resource.object: Can't get a Billboard client license: {0}.{1}

resource.name: btnParameterConfig.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to show the parameter configuration dialog

resource.name: btnOk.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to accept changes and close form

resource.name: btnCancel.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to cancel changes and close form

resource.name: InvalidValueMinimumAllowedIs
resource.object: Invalid value. Minimum allowed value is

resource.name: InvalidValueMaximumAllowedIs
resource.object: Invalid value. Maximum allowed value is

resource.name: InvisibleNotNullError
resource.object:
The invisible column '{0}' does not allow nulls.
Please inform your system administrator about this problem.

Try again when the problem has been fixed.

resource.name: AdminInvisibleNotNullError
resource.object:
The invisible column '{0}' does not allow nulls.
Do you want to show it and fix the value?

Note: In order to make the column visible to other users
you will need to enter design mode and save your changes.

resource.name: MoreThanExclusive
resource.object: The value must be less than {0}

resource.name: MoreThanMaxInclusive
resource.object: The value must be less than or equal to {0}

resource.name: LessThanMinExclusive
resource.object: The value must be higher then {0}

resource.name: LessThanMinInclusive
resource.object: The value must be higher than or equal to {0}

resource.name: ProtoCon.Failed.NoConnection
resource.object: Unable to connect to VNC host

resource.name: ProtoCon.Failed.CheckVncHost
resource.object: Check that a VNC host is running there.

resource.name: Con.Password
resource.object: Please check if the password is correct.

resource.name: edHostAddress.Hint
resource.object: The IP address or host name of the VNC server. Port can be included after :

resource.name: NoHost.Error
resource.object: Please enter IP address or name of the VNC server.

resource.name: btnFileSaveAsItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Open the Save As dialog box to select a file format and save the document to a new location.

resource.name: btnQuickPrintItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Send the document directly to the default printer without making changes.

resource.name: btnPrintItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Select a printer, number of copies, and other printing options before printing.

resource.name: btnPasteItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Paste the contents of the Clipboard.

resource.name: btnCutItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Cut the selection from the document and put it on the Clipboard.

resource.name: btnCopyItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Copy the selection and put it on the Clipboard.

resource.name: btnToggleShowHorizontalRulerItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: View the horizontal ruler, used to measure and line up objects in the document.

resource.name: btnToggleShowVerticalRulerItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: View the vertical ruler, used to measure and line up objects in the document.

resource.name: btnSwitchToSimpleViewItem.Hint.Content
resource.object:
View the document as a simple memo.
This view ignores the page layout to draw attention to text editing.

resource.name: btnSwitchToDraftViewItem.Hint.Content
resource.object:
View the document as a draft to quickly edit the text.
Certain elements of the document such as headers and footers will not be visible in this view.

resource.name: btnSwitchToPrintLayoutViewItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: View the document as it will appear on the printed page.

resource.name: btnToggleFontStrikeoutItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Draw a line through the middle of the selected text.

resource.name: btnToggleFontSuperscriptItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Create small letters above the line of text.

resource.name: btnToggleFontSubscriptItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Create small letters below the text baseline.

resource.name: btnChangeFontBackColorItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Make text look like it was marked with a highlighter pen.

resource.name: btnChangeTextCaseItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Change all the selected text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, or other common capitalizations.

resource.name: btnClearFormattingItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Clear all the formatting from the selection, leaving only plain text.

resource.name: btnDecreaseIndentItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Decrease the indent level of the paragraph.

resource.name: btnIncreaseIndentItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Increase the indent level of the paragraph.

resource.name: btnToggleParagraphAlignmentJustifyItem.Hint.Content
resource.object:
Align text to both left and right margins, adding extra space between words as necessary.
This creates a clean look along the left and right side of the page.

resource.name: btnToggleShowWhitespaceItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Show paragraph marks and other hidden formatting symbols.

resource.name: btnChangeParagraphLineSpacingItem.Hint.Content
resource.object:
Change the spacing between lines of text.
You can also customize the amount of space added before and after paragraphs.

resource.name: btnChangeParagraphBackColorItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Change the background behind the selected paragraph.

resource.name: btnMakeTextUpperCaseItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Change all the selected text to UPPERCASE.

resource.name: btnMakeTextLowerCaseItem.Hint.Content
resource.object: Change all the selected text to lowercase.

resource.name: DescCmd_GotoToday
resource.object: Change the date displayed in the current view to the current date.

resource.name: labelInstruction.Text
resource.object: Configuration values for dashboard component are shown below. \nPlease update the fields as need (point to new obejcts). \nUse copy button to copy value to all fields with same name.

resource.name: InvisibleNotNullError
resource.object:
The invisible column '{0}' does not allow nulls.
Please inform your system administrator about this problem.

Try again when the problem has been fixed.

resource.name: AdminInvisibleNotNullError
resource.object:
The invisible column '{0}' does not allow nulls.
Do you want to show it and fix the value?

Note: In order to make the column visible to other users
you will need to enter design mode and save your changes.

resource.name: RemoveSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to remove this row?

resource.name: RemoveMultipleRows
resource.object: Do you want to remove selected rows?

resource.name: readOnlyRowFormulaLabel.Text
resource.object: Formula that decides if a row should be read-only:

resource.name: NoName
resource.object: You must choose a name for the new template.

resource.name: NameExists
resource.object: A template with the name "{0}" already exists.\nPlease choose a new name.

resource.name: DBError
resource.object: An error has occurred while updating the database.

resource.name: SaveMessage
resource.object: You have unsaved data.\nDo you want to save?

resource.name: DeleteMessage
resource.object: Caption is in use.\nDo you want to delete it anyway?

resource.name: TextNumberValidate
resource.object: Text number is already in use.

resource.name: NoCaptionValidate
resource.object: You must enter some caption text.

resource.name: DeleteMultipleRows
resource.object: Do you want to delete {0} rows

resource.name: DeleteSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to delete this row?

resource.name: Text
resource.object: Select data source and parameter value field

resource.name: btnOpenLicense.Hint
resource.object: To open license key data from a file.

resource.name: btnPasteKey.Hint
resource.object: To paste license key data from the clipboard.

resource.name: btnCompare.Hint
resource.object: To compare license key with existing key.

resource.name: btnGetLicenseKey.Hint
resource.object: To request a license key from CLM License Service.

resource.name: LicenseKeyFormatError
resource.object: The format of the License Key is invalid.

resource.name: Install.NoKeyError
resource.object: No current license key installed. A new key cannot be installed through this interface.

resource.name: Install.TemporaryTypeError
resource.object: Temporary license key cannot be installed over permanent key.

resource.name: Install.PermanentTypeError
resource.object: Permanent license key cannot be installed over temporary key.

resource.name: Install.ExtensionError
resource.object: The License Key can not be installed, it is not an extension of the existing key.

resource.name: Install.ExtensionError2
resource.object: Use the compare button to compare the key to the existing key.

resource.name: Install.Ok
resource.object: The License Key was installed successfully.

resource.name: Save.Title
resource.object: Select file to store the request data to.

resource.name: Error.Invalid.Text
resource.object:
Unable to create a configuration object for
'{0}'

Either it can not be found or it does not implement the IObjectDesignable interface.

resource.name: NoMu1Ax
resource.object: Unable connect to ActiveX control for Mu1 display

resource.name: errInitBarcode
resource.object: Device {0} is not supported as a Barcode reader. \nAny barcodes from this reader will not be sent to the proper display view.

resource.name: PutIdOnReader
resource.object: Put your ID on the reader

resource.name: NoGroupAccess
resource.object: User has currently no access to IPC

resource.name: Error.Text.PageNotFound
resource.object: Dashboard page not found. Check configuration.
